basic_info.title: Xenoblade Chronicles
basic_info.review: Xenoblade Chronicles is a landmark JRPG praised for its massive world design, epic storytelling, and innovative real-time combat system. The Definitive Edition brings this classic to modern platforms with enhanced visuals and new content.

similar_games.title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild

play_today.details: The definitive version with enhanced HD visuals, remastered 90+ music tracks, improved UI, quality-of-life improvements, and the exclusive Future Connected epilogue story.

recommended_patches.name: AA/Blur Removal Mod
recommended_patches.description: Removes anti-aliasing and blur filters for sharper visuals at 1080p and above.

recommended_patches.name: No Sharpening Filter
recommended_patches.description: Removes the sharpening filter applied to character models for more natural visuals.

optimal_settings: Internal resolution: 3x or higher for HD output

description.synopsis: In a world where two titans, the Bionis and Mechonis, stand frozen in eternal battle, humanity lives on the Bionis. Shulk, a young inventor, discovers he can wield the legendary Monado blade and sees visions of the future as he sets out to destroy the mechanical invaders known as the Mechon.
key_features: Massive seamless world spanning two titans frozen in battle
Real-time strategic combat with positioning-based mechanics
Chain Attacks for powerful party-wide combos
Future-seeing ability through the Monado blade
Over 90 remastered music tracks by Yasunori Mitsuda
description.long_description: Xenoblade Chronicles, developed by Monolith Soft and published by Nintendo, is widely considered one of the greatest JRPGs ever made. Originally released on Wii in Japan (2010) and later internationally (2011-2012), the game was never officially released in North America until a limited GameStop exclusive run in 2012. The story follows Shulk, who wields the legendary Monado blade that allows him to see visions of the future. Set on the bodies of two colossal titans locked in eternal battle, players explore a massive seamless world while battling the mechanical Mechon invaders. The Definitive Edition for Nintendo Switch (May 2020) features enhanced HD visuals, remastered music, improved UI, quality-of-life improvements, and the exclusive Future Connected epilogue that continues Shulk and Melia's story.
legacy_and_impact: Considered one of the greatest JRPGs of all time
Influenced open-world game design in subsequent titles
Established Monolith Soft as a premier RPG developer
Yasunori Mitsuda's soundtrack remains highly acclaimed decades later
